chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. Bail Appln. No.S — 732 of 2022. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 14.07.2022. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 6242/2022. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTION. FOR ORDERS ON M.A. 6243/2022. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. Mr. Abdul Majeed Lashari Advocate along with the applicant. ------ 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption allowed subject to all just exceptions. 4. The Applicant/accused Noor Muhammad seeks protective bail in crime No.16 of 2022, registered at Police Station Vijuto, District Tharparkar under section 302, 114, 34, 504 PPC. It is inter-alia contended that applicant/accused is prepared to surrender before the trial Court, but he apprehends his imminent arrest before reaching the said Court, as such, he seeks protective bail to enable him to appear before the learned trial court for seeking pre-arrest bail. Serious malafides on the part of the complainant and the police have been alleged. Without touching merits of the case, in order to enable the Applicant to appear and surrender before the trial Court, the Applicant is admitted to protective bail for five days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.100,000/-(One Hundred Thousand) and P.R. bond in the like sum to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. The applicant is directed to join the investigation. In case the Applicant fails to surrender before the trial Court within the time specified, surety furnished before this Court shall stand forfeited. This protective bail shall remain effective up to 18.07.2022 or when the applicant surrender before the trial Court whichever is the earlier.

In case the Applicant fails to surrender before the trial Court within the time specified, surety furnished before this Court shall stand forfeited. This protective bail shall remain effective up to 18.07.2022 or when the applicant surrender before the trial Court whichever is the earlier. This criminal bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE A.
